creator: brian355210@gmail.com
text:
I am having this too. It seems to be happening as soon as I did my last yum update on Alma 8.5

----------------------------------

[root@NAS ~]# uname -a
Linux NAS 4.18.0-348.20.1.el8_5.x86_64 #1 SMP Thu Mar 10 11:31:47 EST 2022 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
[root@NAS ~]# cat /etc/redhat-release 
AlmaLinux release 8.5 (Arctic Sphynx)
[root@NAS ~]# rpm -qa zfs
zfs-2.0.7-1.el8.x86_64
[root@NAS ~]#

ID     | Command line                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Date and time    | Action(s)      | Altered
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    86 | update --exclude=kernel* -y                                                                                                                                                                                             | 2022-05-03 22:25 | Upgrade        |   23
